Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Redesign cards dashboard with Flowbite components and inline SVG icons

Integrate Flowbite \(CSS CDN + turbo-compatible JS via importmap\) for
interactive UI features like dismissible alerts and tooltips. Add icon\(\)
helper with 14 inline SVG constants for consistent iconography. Redesign
all card views with color-coded kanban columns, dark navbar, hover-reveal
drag handles, status badges with lock/unlock icons, and Flowbite-styled
form controls. All existing functionality \(drag-and-drop, Turbo Streams,
close/reopen, CRUD\) is preserved.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/jcalonsov/Projects/RAILS/rails-ai-agents commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add authentication, public landing page, dashboard sidebar, and breadcrumbs

Implement Rails 8 authentication \(sign in, sign up, password reset\) with
a public marketing layout, restructured dashboard with sidebar navigation
and user dropdown, and Flowbite-styled breadcrumbs across all pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(python3 -c "
css = open\(''/Users/jcalonsov/Projects/RAILS/rails-ai-agents/app/assets/builds/tailwind.css''\).read\(\)
import re
for cls in [''from-blue-600'', ''via-blue-700'', ''to-indigo-800'']:
    for m in re.finditer\(r''\\.'' + cls.replace\(''-'', r''\\-''\) + r''[^{]*\\{[^}]*\\}'', css\):
        print\(m.group\(\)\)
        print\(''---''\)
")
